message:
refactor(workflows): extract plan helpers and coordination to submodules [ft-c45am]

Extracts Plan-first Execution Helpers (~145 lines) to plan_helpers.rs and
Multi-Pane Coordination + Unstick Workflow (~1115 lines) to coordination.rs.

Combined extraction of ~1260 lines. mod.rs: 18,296 → 17,041 lines.
